briefs._status_line: Built 6-shot REEL blueprint · aligned to Copy beats · locked cover frame · ready for Manual Reel

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

visual_direction.color_bias: #C9A84C accent on #0D0D0D background, FKM rubber texture visible
visual_direction.motion_style: Slow push-ins, controlled whip pans, no handheld shake

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) seated on Royal Pop, top-down view
shot_list.action: Slow push-in to reveal 40.35mm socket and 0.7mm retaining lip
shot_list.framing: Centered, shallow depth of field, FKM texture in focus
shot_list.must_capture: IMG_01_HERO (reuse_for_video: true), 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, FKM texture

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) isolated, top and side views with spec callouts
shot_list.action: Whip pan from top to side view, labels animate on-screen (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm)
shot_list.framing: Orthographic projection, white background, flat lighting
shot_list.must_capture: IMG_02_TECHNICAL_BOARD (reuse_for_video: true), 40.35mm socket (labeled), 0.7mm retaining lip (labeled), 22mm lug width (labeled)

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) on Royal Pop, side view
shot_list.action: Slow tilt down to show 22mm lug alignment with standard strap
shot_list.framing: Side profile, FKM texture visible, slight angle to emphasize depth
shot_list.must_capture: 22mm lug width, FKM rubber material, standard strap compatibility

shot_list.subject: Split frame: Cradle Adapter V1 (left) vs. generic competitor adapter (right) on Royal Pop
shot_list.action: Static shot, subtle zoom to emphasize fit differences
shot_list.framing: Split screen, consistent lighting, top-down view
shot_list.must_capture: IMG_03_SIDE_BY_SIDE (reuse_for_video: true), 40.35mm socket fit, 0.7mm lip visibility, FKM vs. competitor material

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Arctic Blue) on Royal Pop, worn on wrist
shot_list.action: Slow pan from wrist to adapter, FKM texture visible
shot_list.framing: Wrist shot, slight angle, natural lighting, blurred background
shot_list.must_capture: IMG_04_WRIST_SHOT (reuse_for_video: true), Arctic Blue colourway, Royal Pop fit, wearability

shot_list.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) seated on Royal Pop, top-down view (repeat of Shot 1)
shot_list.action: Static shot, text overlay: 'Pre-Order Now — limited early access.'
shot_list.framing: Centered, shallow depth of field, FKM texture in focus

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Open with Shot 1 (MACRO). Overlay text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.' Sync with script beat '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.'
Cut to Shot 2 (CLOSE). Animate spec labels (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm) on-screen. Sync with script beat 'Competitors miss this.'
Cut to Shot 3 (MEDIUM). Sync with script beat 'Exact fit for Royal Pop’s socket.'
edit_plan.on_screen_text: Exact fit for Royal Pop’s socket.

edit_plan.edit_instruction: Cut to Shot 2 (CLOSE) side view. Sync with script beat '0.7mm lip holds it secure.'
Cut to Shot 3 (MEDIUM) with strap. Sync with script beat '22mm lugs. Standard straps work.'
Cut to Shot 4 (WIDE). Sync with script beat 'Generic adapters? Loose. Risky.' Overlay text: 'Generic adapters: Loose fit. Risky.'
Cut to Shot 5 (CLOSE). Sync with script beat 'Pre-Order Now — limited early access.' Overlay text: 'Pre-Order Now — limited early access.'
End with Shot 6 (MACRO). Static shot, no text overlay. Hold for 1s.

asset_requirements.description: Motion version of IMG_02_TECHNICAL_BOARD with animated spec labels (40.35mm, 0.7mm, 22mm).
Motion transition from IMG_01_HERO to IMG_03_SIDE_BY_SIDE for Shot 4.

briefs.cover_frame_direction: Use Shot 1 (MACRO) frame. Centered Cradle Adapter V1 on Royal Pop, 40.35mm socket and 0.7mm lip in focus. Overlay text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.' in #F0EDE8 on #0D0D0D background.
briefs.subtitle_style: Font: Helvetica Neue Bold. Color: #F0EDE8. Size: 32pt. Position: Bottom 20% of frame. Background: #0D0D0D at 70% opacity. No drop shadow.
briefs.handoff_for_manual_reel: Shoot all shots in 4K, 24fps, 9:16 aspect ratio. Use tripod for stability. Prioritize slow, controlled camera movements. Ensure FKM rubber texture is visible in all close-ups. For Shot 4, use consistent lighting across both adapters. Deliver raw footage + LUT for #C9A84C accent. Sync edit to provided edit_plan and reel_script beats.
